config_files.line: "# Your Twilio Account SID. Get a free account at twilio.com/try-twilio",
"# Your Twilio Auth Token. You can get it at twilio.com/console",
"# Your Twilio Account SID. Get a free account at twilio.com/try-twilio",
"# Your Twilio Auth Token. You can get it at twilio.com/console",
"# Your Twilio Auth Token. You can get it at twilio.com/console",
"# Your Twilio Auth Token. You can get it at twilio.com/console",
"# Application SID. Create a new one: https://www.twilio.com/console/voice/dev-tools/twiml-apps",
"# Application SID. Create a new one: https://www.twilio.com/console/voice/dev-tools/twiml-apps",
# Your Twilio Account SID. Get a free account at twilio.com/try-twilio
# Your Twilio Auth Token. You can get it at twilio.com/console
# Application SID. Create a new one: https://www.twilio.com/console/voice/dev-tools/twiml-apps
"description": "Your Twilio account secret ID, you can find at: https://www.twilio.com/user/account",
"description": "Your secret Twilio Auth token, you can find at: https://www.twilio.com/user/account",
"description": "The Twilio phone number you are using for this app. You can get one here: https://www.twilio.com/user/account/phone-numbers/incoming",
"description": "The Twilio Application SID. You can get one here: https://www.twilio.com/user/account/apps",

Before you can run this app you need to go into your account portal and [create a new Twilio Application](https://www.twilio.com/console/phone-numbers/runtime/twiml-apps). Once you have created an app the urls should look like:
You will also need a `TWILIO_NUMBER`, which you may find [here](https://www.twilio.com/console/phone-numbers/incoming).
Congratulations! You've just deployed the <a href="http://www.twilio.com/docs/howto/walkthrough/<%= slug %>/<%= language %>/<%= framework %>"
Tweet to us @twilio if you have
Back To Tutorial
reported by contacting the project team at open-source@twilio.com. All

# Airtng App: Part 2 - Anonymous Calling and SMS with Twilio

Protect your customers' privacy, and create a seamless interaction by provisioning Twilio numbers on the fly, and routing all voice calls, and messages through your very own 3rd party. This allows you to control the interaction between your customers, while putting your customer's privacy first.
1. Configure Twilio App to call your webhooks.

Before you can run this app you need to go into your account portal and [create a new Twilio Application](https://www.twilio.com/console/phone-numbers/runtime/twiml-apps). Once you have created an app the urls should look like:
